meta.title: Quantum Crystal Computing Athena
meta.description: Quantum Fractal Crystal Computing: an addressed, multiscale crystal substrate where the unknown is a lawful state, generators and constraint-outlines replace bulk expansions, and computation pulls a solution from the void by tightening invariants until a unique completion remains.

query_state.definition: Q = (h_Q, O_Q, C_Q, R_Q, k_Q, Θ_Q)

components.name: h_Q
components.description: Locates the query in the crystal lattice

components.name: O_Q
components.description: The target object or answer being searched for

components.name: C_Q
components.description: Boundary conditions and requirements the solution must satisfy

components.name: R_Q
components.description: Which SFCR lens rotations must be applied

components.name: k_Q
components.description: How deep to search at each scale level

components.name: Θ_Q
components.description: Thresholds for accepting a solution as final

desire_field.definition: D_Q(X) = I(Q,X) = λ_a·Align(Q,X) + λ_e·Expl(X) + λ_z·ZPA(Q,X) + λ_c·ConSat(Q,X)

action_law.K: Kinetic cost — computational effort to reach candidate X
action_law.D_Q: Desire — how much the crystal wants candidate X
action_law.A: Net action — the quantity to minimize

resonance_metric.definition: R_Q(X) = w₁·AddrFit + w₂·InvFit + w₃·Phase + w₄·Boundary + w₅·Scale + w₆·Compress

components.name: Phase
components.role: Phase coherence — alignment with crystal phase structure

components.name: Scale
components.role: Scale consistency — proper behavior under RG flow

components.name: Addr(X)
components.role: Address proof — crystal coordinate where X lands

components.name: C(X)
components.role: Conservation certificate — which laws are preserved

desire_compiler.signature: D: U → (Q_U, D_U, O_U, Π_U, Θ_U, G_U)

resonance_scheduler.state: S_U(t) = (β_t, F_t, ℓ_t, a_t, P_t, H_t, Z_t)
resonance_scheduler.rotation_trigger: Switch lens when -E[ΔA]/ΔK < τ_U (expected improvement below threshold)
resonance_scheduler.pruning: Remove candidates from P_t that fall below resonance threshold ρ

resonance_kernel.definition: K_U = (W_□, W_✿, W_☁, W_◇, T_↔, A_bus, G_witness)

shared_state.G_witness: Witness bus — shared commit witness accumulator

resonance_kernel.kernel_step: (ℓ,a,b) = S_U(S_t) → W_ℓ executes → bus merges → status check

crystal_search_law.admissible_set: A_Q — the set of candidates reachable from the query address

runtime_loop.name: Crystal-Wide Reasoning Loop

steps.name: Inject
steps.description: Receive unknown U into the crystal substrate

steps.name: Compile
steps.description: Run Desire Compiler D: U → (Q, D, O, Π, Θ, G)

steps.name: Propagate
steps.description: Spread desire field through the lattice via transport law

steps.name: Check
steps.description: Test R_Q(X) ≥ ρ and all tolerances

steps.name: Commit
steps.description: Write CommitWitness W_Q and emit solution X*

runtime_loop.termination: Loop ends when: (a) solution passes all checks, or (b) budget exhausted
